_doc: Visual + semantic toolkit for this region. Generated by the bootstrap — edit freely. See FORKING.md.
_scale_mode_doc: 'auto' keeps these labels/colors but re-derives the MW bounds from your data at load time. Switch to 'fixed' once you know the right thresholds for your region.
_utilities_todo: Add the utilities serving OHIO. 'match' holds lowercase substrings used to recognize each one in your data. Until then, every site shows the neutral other_utility label.
_terminology_todo: Set regulator / consumer_advocate to OHIO's utility regulator and ratepayer advocate — they're used in the civic action links.
_jobs_todo: jobs.comparison is the jobs-per-MW figure for other industry in your region, used for the employment comparison. Set it from a local source, or null to hide the comparison.
